public_reputation: Known around Plume’s End Outpost through day-to-day work as tavern rumor broker.
manner: Trades in overheard truth, half-truth, and motive, smiling most when others forget how much was just learned. In Plume’s End Outpost, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of tavern rumor broker in and around Plume’s End Outpost, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Plume’s End Outpost workable through the obligations of tavern rumor broker while managing the immediate pressure of caravan disruption rumors, celestial enforcer sightings.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of tavern rumor broker credible while absorbing the strain created by caravan disruption rumors, celestial enforcer sightings.

adventure_hooks.summary: Aldren Sunweave can draw the party into a locality problem centered on tavern rumor broker duties in Plume’s End Outpost.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Aldren Sunweave is immediately readable as a tavern rumor broker tied to Plume’s End Outpost.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Plume’s End Outpost: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Aldren Sunweave presents as someone shaped by the duties of a tavern rumor broker and the daily pressures of Plume’s End Outpost.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a tavern rumor broker, and proof that strangers will not make Plume’s End Outpost harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Aldren Sunweave refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a tavern rumor broker too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can surface hidden currents, soft names, and the version of events not in official records.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Aldren Sunweave adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Aldren Sunweave always knows more about Plume’s End Outpost than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a tavern rumor broker in Plume’s End Outpost.
